text.title: AI-Native Product Development Operating Model Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: spec-with-evals
step.action: Write PRD that names eval_set_id + threshold values before engineering kickoff.
step.decision-gate: If thresholds absent, do not schedule eng work.

step.name: version-prompts
step.action: Move prompts to repo; tag v1.0.0; require PR review for edits.

step.name: guardrail-review
step.action: Run prompt-injection, PII leak, jailbreak, refusal checks; record sign-off.

step.name: wire-dual-telemetry
step.action: Emit model metrics + product metrics to one dashboard; alerts on threshold breach.

step.name: rollout-and-monitor
step.action: Canary 5% → 25% → 100% with halt rule on threshold breach.
